name: Flagship synthetic disease-vs-normal module dataset
public_license_status: synthetic demo data included for local validation; replace with a public omics export for the judged run
notes: Designed so a compact buffered activation law can survive falsification.

name: Transfer synthetic disease-vs-normal module dataset
public_license_status: synthetic demo data included for local validation; replace with a second public omics export for the judged run
notes: Designed to replay the same workflow with a related but non-identical compact law family.

name: Flagship KIRC-flavoured synthetic demo (HIF-axis gene panel)
public_license_status: synthetic; gene-name contract matches real TCGA-KIRC for plug-in compatibility
notes: Used by `make demo-kirc`. Same gene names + label semantics as real TCGA-KIRC so the pipeline path is identical to the published runs.

name: Transfer KIRC-flavoured synthetic demo (independent-cohort replay)
public_license_status: synthetic; serves as the GSE40435-shaped transfer cohort for the demo replay step
notes: Used by `make demo-kirc` as the synthetic transfer cohort. Same gene-name contract as flagship_kirc_demo.
